final:
module Register32(
    input wire obf_clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [31:0] data_in,
    output reg [31:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 32'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
